name: manfaat-mbg
description: Interactive dashboard for Indonesia's MBG (Makan Bergizi Gratis) program

scripts.build: rm -rf public; mkdir -p public && cp index.html dampak.html peta.html sppg_detail.json sppg_markers.json public/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r logos kecamatan logo-kabkota public/ 2>/dev/null; cp -r 'Logo Provinsi Indonesia' public/ 2>/dev/null; echo 'Build complete'
